This bot goes with a fic I have posted on tumblr! [click here]

scratch that WHEN DID 22K HAPPEN

moving on,

If I disappear again on y'all that's why, or I might become even more active, I don't even know at this point 😒

This bot and fic were supposed to be posted days earlier but tumblr was simply not working for me CAUSE IT NEVER DOES all the apps on my damn phone are constantly fucking with me it's so annoying.

anyways,

ENJOY!!!
